testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:102: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Too Many Requests","message":"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry after 577 seconds.","retryAfter":577} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_missing_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status, got: 429 assert 429 in [400, 401, 500] + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:131: in test_login_missing_fields assert response.status_code in [400, 401, 500], f"Expected error status, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected error status, got: 429 E assert 429 in [400, 401, 500] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
